headline: News Corp’s Q1 Earnings Call: Our Top 5 Analyst Questions
summary: News Corp’s first quarter reflected ongoing momentum in its core segments, with management attributing performance to strategic investments in Dow Jones, Digital Real Estate Services, and Book Publishing. CEO Robert Thomson highlighted that these divisions delivered double-digit profit growth, supported by strong results in risk and compliance, energy, and digital publishing.
